messages.content:
# How to download Setup Exchange to use community tunes
-# Credit to <@588529577094021122>

# Installation Process
> Follow these steps to install Setup Exchange
## Step 1
> Go in game, leave the pit menu, and move your mouse to the right side of the screen to find the **apps list**
> Search for **App Shelf**

## Step 2
> Open **App Shelf** and scroll down until you see **Setup Exchange**

## Step 3
> Click on the **Setup Exchange** app and click **install**

## Step 5
> Close **Setup Exchange**, and return to the pits menu

## Step 6
> Click the **wrench icon** on **the left side of the screen**

## Step 7
> **Setup Exchange** should now be displayed to **the right side of the tuning menu** by default

## Step 8
> Click the **downward arrow icon** in **Setup Exchange**
> Uncheck **Show setups for current track only**

# How To Use
> Follow the following steps to get/upload tunes
## Step 1
> Clicking apply on any setup will **automatically apply the setup to your car**

## Step 2
> To create your own setup, simply click **Share current setup**, and provide a name for the setup
